steps.title: Use only the 2018 exhibition
steps.content: The student wants to describe the exhibition Torres curated in 2018. The notes identify that exhibition as Pacha, Llaqta, Wasichay: Indigenous Space, Modern Architecture, New Art and say it featured works by seven emerging Latino artists.

steps.title: Avoid unrelated exhibitions
steps.content: Choice A describes the 2020 exhibition. Choice C only says Torres curated exhibitions in two years. Choice D compares two exhibitions without describing the 2018 one by name. The best sentence identifies and describes the 2018 exhibition. The answer is B.
